entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: V's career coaching company that should design AI tools to elevate coaches

entities.name: Problem Stack Elevation
entities.context: Belief that AI should elevate humans higher in complexity hierarchy rather than just automating tasks

entities.name: Economic Principle of Complements
entities.context: Framework: as cost of task execution falls via automation, value of strategic oversight increases

entities.name: Expertise Gap
entities.context: Risk where future experts lack foundational training formerly gained through entry-level tasks

entities.name: Syntactic Operations
entities.context: Rules-based, mechanical tasks that can be commoditized by automation

entities.name: Strategic Guidance
entities.context: High-level work including strategy, judgment, and goal synthesis that humans should focus on

entities.name: Holistic Career Trajectory
entities.context: The elevated focus area for coaches when freed from mechanical editing

relationships.context: Should design AI tools following this principle to free coaches for strategic work
Grounded in this economic theory about value migration
Creates this risk as a tradeoff of elevating humans past foundational tasks
Complementary relationship where automating one increases value of the other
The focus area coaches should shift to when AI handles resume production
